description: Multilingual classification eval — English dataset built from anakin87/events-scheduling@f0c948fe0ef600aeebe5aeee625b6fb318901a87 (50 unique titles, paraphrased ~3× via gpt-5.5). Same case ids appear in the ko / zh-CN / zh-TW siblings for cross-lingual comparison. Translated to Korean (한국어) via gpt-5.5.

source.attribution: Source: HuggingFace dataset anakin87/events-scheduling (license: Apache-2.0). Used for evaluation only; not redistributed.

event.summary: 게스트 연사와 함께하는 양자 컴퓨팅 강연
